summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Travelio -> Travelioo rename (Iteration 9). All 15 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified with 'Travelioo' in header. Backend startup logs show 'Travelioo v7.1'. Webhook verify token updated to 'travelioo_verify_2024'. Database name is 'travelioo'. No standalone 'Travelio' found in any endpoint responses.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with error JSON instead of 403 for invalid verify tokens. Functionally correct (doesn't return challenge) but HTTP status could be improved.

passed_tests: Root endpoint name is 'Travelioo WhatsApp Travel Agent'
Root endpoint description does not contain standalone 'Travelio'
Legal terms contains 'Travelioo' and no standalone 'Travelio'
Legal privacy contains 'Travelioo' and no standalone 'Travelio'
Webhook verification fails with old 'travelio_verify_2024' token
Webhook verification fails with wrong token
Consent accept transitions to enrollment_method state
Full enrollment flow works correctly (consent -> enrollment_method -> manual entry -> profile confirmation)
Booking flow destination and date work correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Rename from Travelio to Travelioo completed successfully across all files
Backend startup logs correctly show 'Travelioo v7.1'
Webhook verify token updated from 'travelio_verify_2024' to 'travelioo_verify_2024'
Email addresses in legal docs are obfuscated by Cloudflare (support@travelioo.app, dpo@travelioo.app)
Booking ID prefix TRV- remains unchanged as expected

mocked_apis.note: All payment and flight APIs are MOCKED/SIMULATED in sandbox mode
mocked_list: Duffel GDS - SANDBOX mode (mock flights generated)
WhatsApp Cloud API - message sending logged, not sent

test_credentials: No auth required - test endpoints are open. Use POST /api/test/simulate with {phone, message}. Webhook verify token: travelioo_verify_2024
seed_data_creation: Tests use unique phone numbers with timestamps (+22990ENR{timestamp}) for clean sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Travelio -> Travelioo rename testing complete (Iteration 9). Key verifications: (1) All string literals, display text, legal documents use 'Travelioo' (double 'o'), (2) No standalone 'Travelio' found in any endpoint responses, (3) Webhook verify token is 'travelioo_verify_2024', (4) Database name is 'travelioo', (5) Backend startup logs show 'Travelioo v7.1', (6) Frontend header shows 'Travelioo'. All core flows (consent, enrollment, booking, cancellation, modification) still work correctly. Booking ID prefix TRV- unchanged as expected.
